# Clipping region atom

**Data field**

An atom that specifies the clipping region.

## Overview

See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Clipping_region_atom].

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this clipping atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
